ingredients: 3 large eggs,  2 strips turkey bacon,  1 whole wheat flour tortilla (10-inch),   cup shredded cheddar cheese,  Handful baby spinach,  Salt and black pepper to taste

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Granola & Berries
ingredients: 1 cup plain full-fat Greek yogurt,   cup granola (use nut-free/GF granola if needed),   cup mixed berries (blueberries, strawberries, raspberries),  1 tbsp raw honey,  1 tbsp chia seeds

name: Overnight Oats with Almond Butter & Banana
ingredients: cup rolled oats (use certified GF oats if needed),   cup whole milk or oat milk,  2 tbsp natural almond butter,  1 ripe banana, sliced,  1 tbsp maple syrup or honey,   tsp cinnamon, pinch of salt

name: Mini Egg Muffins with Spinach & Cheese
ingredients: 6 large eggs,  1 cup baby spinach, chopped,   cup shredded mozzarella or cheddar,   cup diced bell pepper (any colour),  2 tbsp milk,  Salt, black pepper, garlic powder to taste,  Cooking spray

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Eggs
ingredients: 2 slices whole wheat or sourdough bread,  1 ripe avocado,  2 large eggs,  1 tbsp fresh lemon juice,   tsp red chili flakes (optional),  Salt, black pepper, everything bagel seasoning (optional)

name: Cottage Cheese Bowl with Pineapple & Walnuts
ingredients: 1 cup low-fat cottage cheese,   cup fresh pineapple chunks,  2 tbsp chopped walnuts,  1 tbsp raw honey,  Pinch of cinnamon

name: Smoked Salmon Bagel with Cream Cheese & Cucumber
ingredients: 1 whole wheat or gluten-free bagel,  2 oz (55 g) cream cheese,  2 oz (55 g) smoked salmon,  4 thin cucumber slices,  1 tsp capers (optional),  Fresh dill or chives,  Lemon wedge for serving

name: Sweet Potato & Egg Hash
ingredients: 2 medium sweet potatoes, diced small (skin on or off),  4 large eggs,  1 red or green bell pepper, diced,   yellow onion, diced,  2 tbsp olive oil,   tsp smoked paprika,   tsp cumin,  Salt and black pepper to taste,  Fresh cilantro or parsley to garnish

name: Whole Wheat Banana Oat Pancakes
ingredients: 1 cup whole wheat flour,   cup rolled oats,  2 large eggs,  1 very ripe banana, mashed,  1 cup whole milk or almond milk,  1 tsp baking powder,   tsp vanilla extract,  Pinch of salt,  2 tbsp natural peanut or sunflower seed butter (for serving),  Sliced banana and drizzle of honey (for serving)

name: Chicken Congee with Soft-Boiled Egg
ingredients: cup jasmine or short-grain rice,  4 cups low-sodium chicken broth,  1 cup cooked chicken breast, shredded,  2 large eggs,  1-inch piece fresh ginger, grated,  2 scallions (spring onions), thinly sliced,  1 tsp soy sauce or tamari (GF),   tsp sesame oil,  White pepper to taste

name: Tamagoyaki with Brown Rice & Miso Soup
ingredients: 3 large eggs,  1 tsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tsp mirin (or  tsp honey),  1 cup cooked short-grain brown rice,  1 cup hot water + 1 tbsp white miso paste,  1 scallion, finely sliced,  1 tsp neutral oil (avocado or light sesame)

name: Tuna & Brown Rice Onigiri (Rice Balls)
ingredients: 2 cups cooked short-grain brown rice (warm),  1 can (5 oz / 142 g) water-packed tuna, drained,  1 tbsp plain Greek yogurt or light mayo,  1 tsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  2 sheets nori (dried seaweed), cut in half,   tsp sesame seeds (optional  omit for SesF),  Pinch of sea salt

name: Korean Veggie & Egg Fried Rice (Bokkeumbap)
ingredients: 2 cups day-old cooked brown rice,  3 large eggs,   cup frozen peas and diced carrots, thawed,   cup shredded purple cabbage,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  1 tbsp avocado or vegetable oil,  2 scallions, sliced

name: Moong Dal Chilla with Mint-Coriander Chutney
ingredients: 1 cup split yellow moong dal (soaked 4+ hours or overnight, then drained),  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  1 green chilli, deseeded (optional),   cup fresh spinach, finely chopped,   tsp turmeric,   tsp cumin seeds,  Salt to taste,  1 tsp oil per chilla for cooking,   cup plain low-fat yogurt + mint chutney to serve

name: Besan Omelette (Chickpea Flour Pancake)  Egg-Free
ingredients: cup besan (chickpea flour),   cup water (adjust for batter consistency),   small onion, finely diced,   small tomato, finely diced,  2 tbsp fresh spinach, chopped,   tsp turmeric,   tsp cumin powder,  Pinch of red chili flakes (optional),  Salt to taste,  1 tsp olive or avocado oil,  Fresh coriander to garnish

name: Paneer & Spinach Paratha with Plain Yogurt
ingredients: 1 cups whole wheat flour (atta), plus extra for rolling,  Water to knead (approx.  cup),  1 cup crumbled low-fat paneer (Indian cottage cheese),   cup baby spinach, finely chopped,   tsp cumin powder,   tsp garam masala,   tsp turmeric,  Salt to taste,  1 tsp ghee or olive oil per paratha,  1 cup plain low-fat yogurt to serve

name: Poha with Peanuts, Edamame & Lemon
ingredients: 2 cups thick flattened rice (poha),   cup roasted peanuts (omit for PF  use pepitas instead),   cup frozen edamame, thawed,   small onion, finely diced,  1 small potato, diced small (optional for extra carbs),   tsp turmeric,   tsp mustard seeds,  810 curry leaves,  2 tbsp avocado or coconut oil,  Juice of 1 lemon,  Salt to taste, fresh coriander to garnish

name: Huevos Rancheros with Black Beans
ingredients: 4 large eggs,  4 corn tortillas (6-inch),  1 cup canned black beans, rinsed and warmed,   cup fresh or jarred low-sodium salsa,   cup crumbled cotija or shredded pepper jack cheese,  1 ripe avocado, sliced,  2 tbsp plain Greek yogurt or sour cream,  Fresh cilantro and lime wedge to serve

name: Egg & Black Bean Breakfast Quesadilla
ingredients: 2 whole wheat flour tortillas (8-inch),  3 large eggs, beaten,   cup canned black beans, rinsed,   cup shredded pepper jack or cheddar cheese,   cup diced red bell pepper,  2 tbsp low-sodium salsa,  1 tsp olive oil,  Salt and pepper to taste

name: Chilaquiles with Salsa Verde & Fried Egg
ingredients: 2 cups baked corn tortilla chips (low-sodium),  1 cup store-bought or homemade salsa verde,  4 large eggs,   cup crumbled queso fresco or feta,   cup canned black beans, rinsed and warmed,   ripe avocado, sliced,  2 tbsp plain Greek yogurt,  Fresh cilantro, lime wedge,  1 tsp olive oil

name: Natto & Brown Rice Power Bowl
ingredients: 1 pack natto (fermented soybeans, ~45 g  available at Asian grocery stores),  1 cup cooked short-grain brown rice,  1 tsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tsp Japanese mustard (optional),  1 scallion, finely sliced,  1 sheet nori, cut into thin strips,  1 tsp rice vinegar

name: Chinese Steamed Egg Custard (Zheng Shui Dan)
ingredients: 3 large eggs,   cup low-sodium chicken or vegetable broth (warm, not boiling),  1 tsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,   tsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  1 scallion, sliced thin,  Pinch of white pepper

name: Idli with Sambar & Coconut Chutney
ingredients: 8 store-bought or homemade idli (fermented rice & lentil cakes),  1 cups ready-made low-sodium sambar (lentil vegetable stew),   cup fresh coconut chutney (blend:  cup grated coconut, 1 green chilli, 1 tsp ginger, salt, water),   tsp mustard seeds + curry leaves for chutney tempering,  1 tsp oil for tempering

name: Machaca con Huevo (Shredded Beef Scramble)
ingredients: 6 oz (170 g) machaca (dried shredded beef) or lean cooked shredded beef,  4 large eggs, beaten,   small white onion, diced,  1 small tomato, diced,  1 serrano or jalapeo chilli, finely diced (optional),  1 tbsp avocado oil,  Salt and black pepper to taste,  4 warm corn tortillas and fresh salsa to serve

name: Greek Yogurt Smoothie Bowl with Seeds & Fruit
ingredients: cup plain full-fat Greek yogurt,   frozen banana,   cup frozen mango chunks,  Splash of whole milk or oat milk to blend,  1 tbsp chia seeds,  1 tbsp hemp hearts (hulled hemp seeds),   cup fresh berries (blueberries, raspberries),  1 tbsp raw honey,  2 tbsp granola (nut-free if needed)

name: Turkey, Avocado & Veggie Whole Wheat Wrap
ingredients: 1 large whole wheat tortilla (10-inch),  3 oz (85 g) sliced oven-roasted turkey breast (low-sodium),   ripe avocado, sliced,  1 large romaine leaf,  4 slices cucumber,  4 cherry tomatoes, halved,  1 tbsp hummus or plain Greek yogurt spread,  1 tsp Dijon mustard,  Salt and black pepper to taste

name: Chicken Teriyaki Bowl with Brown Rice & Edamame
ingredients: 2 boneless chicken thighs (about 10 oz / 280 g total),  3 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tbsp honey,  1 tsp rice vinegar,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  1 tsp arrowroot or cornstarch (to thicken sauce),  1 cups cooked brown rice,   cup frozen edamame, thawed,   cup shredded purple cabbage,  2 scallions, sliced,  1 tsp sesame seeds (optional  omit for SesF)

name: Bibimbap (Korean Mixed Rice Bowl with Beef & Egg)
ingredients: 1 cups cooked short-grain brown rice,  6 oz (170 g) lean ground beef or thinly sliced sirloin,  2 large eggs (fried or soft-boiled),  1 cup baby spinach, blanched and squeezed dry,  1 medium carrot, julienned and sauted,   cup bean sprouts, blanched,  2 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  1 tsp honey,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tbsp gochujang (Korean chili paste, optional  omit for strict LS),  1 tsp avocado oil

name: Dal Tadka with Whole Wheat Roti
ingredients: cup split red lentils (masoor dal), rinsed,  2 cups water,  1 medium tomato, diced,   small onion, diced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,   tsp turmeric,   tsp cumin seeds,   tsp coriander powder,  1 tbsp ghee or avocado oil for tadka,  Salt to taste,  4 small whole wheat rotis (store-bought or homemade),  Fresh coriander and lime wedge to serve

name: Chicken & Black Bean Tortilla Soup
ingredients: 2 boneless chicken breasts (about 12 oz / 340 g),  1 can (15 oz / 425 g) black beans, rinsed,  1 can (14 oz / 400 g) fire-roasted diced tomatoes,  3 cups low-sodium chicken broth,  1 cup frozen corn kernels,  1 small onion, diced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp cumin,   tsp smoked paprika,   tsp chili powder,  1 tbsp avocado oil,  Baked corn tortilla strips, avocado, plain Greek yogurt, and lime to serve

name: Tuna Salad Lettuce Cups
ingredients: 1 can (5 oz / 142 g) water-packed tuna, drained,  2 tbsp plain Greek yogurt (or light mayo),  1 stalk celery, finely diced,  2 tbsp diced red onion,  1 tsp Dijon mustard,  1 tsp lemon juice,  Salt and black pepper to taste,  6 large romaine or butter lettuce leaves,   avocado, sliced (for serving)

name: Ground Turkey & Veggie Brown Rice Bowl
ingredients: 8 oz (225 g) lean ground turkey,  1 cups cooked brown rice,  1 cup broccoli florets, steamed,  1 medium carrot, diced and steamed,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tsp olive oil,   tsp smoked paprika,  Salt and pepper to taste,  Lime wedge and fresh herbs to serve

name: Egg Salad on Whole Wheat with Greens
ingredients: 3 large eggs, hard-boiled and peeled,  1 tbsp plain Greek yogurt,  1 tsp Dijon mustard,  1 stalk celery, finely diced,  Salt, black pepper, smoked paprika to taste,  2 slices whole wheat bread, toasted,  Handful baby spinach or arugula,  2 slices tomato

name: Miso Ramen with Soft-Boiled Egg & Chicken
ingredients: 2 portions buckwheat soba noodles (or ramen noodles),  2 boneless chicken thighs, poached and shredded,  2 large eggs, soft-boiled (67 min),  3 cups low-sodium chicken broth,  2 tbsp white miso paste,  1 tsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  1 cup baby bok choy, halved and blanched,  2 scallions, sliced,  4 slices bamboo shoots (optional)

name: Korean Japchae (Glass Noodles with Beef & Vegetables)
ingredients: 4 oz (115 g) dried sweet potato glass noodles (dangmyeon),  5 oz (140 g) lean beef sirloin, thinly sliced,  1 cup baby spinach,  1 medium carrot, julienned,   red bell pepper, thinly sliced,  3 dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked and sliced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  2 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  1 tsp honey,  1 tsp avocado oil,  1 scallion, sliced

name: Chole (Chickpea Curry) with Basmati Rice
ingredients: 1 can (15 oz / 425 g) chickpeas, rinsed,  1 cup cooked basmati rice,  1 can (14 oz / 400 g) diced tomatoes,  1 small onion, finely diced,  3 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  1 tsp cumin,  1 tsp coriander,   tsp turmeric,   tsp garam masala,   tsp cayenne (optional),  1 tbsp avocado oil,  Salt to taste, fresh coriander and lemon to serve

name: Saag Paneer with Jeera Rice
ingredients: 1 cups baby spinach +  cup frozen peas, blended smooth,  7 oz (200 g) low-fat paneer, cubed,  1 small onion, diced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp ginger, grated,   tsp cumin seeds,   tsp turmeric,   tsp garam masala,  2 tbsp plain low-fat yogurt,  1 tbsp avocado oil,  Salt to taste,  1 cup cooked basmati rice (cumin seeds toasted in oil, then rice cooked)

name: Arroz con Pollo (Chicken & Rice)
ingredients: 3 boneless chicken thighs (about 14 oz / 400 g),  1 cup long-grain or basmati rice,  1 cups low-sodium chicken broth,  1 can (14 oz / 400 g) diced tomatoes,   small onion, diced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,   cup frozen peas,  1 tsp cumin,   tsp smoked paprika,   tsp turmeric (for colour),  1 tbsp avocado oil,  Salt and pepper, fresh cilantro and lime to serve

name: Bean & Cheese Quesadilla with Guacamole
ingredients: 2 whole wheat flour tortillas (8-inch),   cup canned refried beans (low-sodium) or mashed black beans,   cup shredded Monterey Jack or pepper jack cheese,   cup corn kernels,  1 ripe avocado, mashed with lime and a pinch of salt,  2 tbsp low-sodium salsa,  Fresh cilantro to garnish

name: Soba Noodle Salad with Edamame & Sesame Ginger Dressing
ingredients: 6 oz (170 g) dried soba noodles (100% buckwheat for GF),  1 cup frozen edamame, thawed,  1 medium carrot, julienned,   red bell pepper, thinly sliced,  2 scallions, sliced,  1 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tbsp rice vinegar,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  1 tsp honey,  1 tsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  1 tsp sesame seeds (omit for SesF),  1 tsp avocado oil

name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad (No Croutons)
ingredients: 2 boneless chicken breasts (about 10 oz / 280 g),  4 cups chopped romaine lettuce,  3 tbsp plain Greek yogurt,  1 tbsp fresh lemon juice,  1 tsp Worcestershire sauce,  1 small clove garlic, minced,  2 tbsp grated Parmesan,   tsp Dijon mustard,  Salt and black pepper to taste,  Lemon wedges to serve

name: Lentil Vegetable Soup with Whole Wheat Roll
ingredients: 1 cup red lentils, rinsed,  1 medium carrot, diced,  2 stalks celery, diced,  1 small onion, diced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 can (14 oz / 400 g) diced tomatoes,  4 cups low-sodium vegetable or chicken broth,  1 tsp cumin,   tsp turmeric,   tsp smoked paprika,  1 tbsp olive oil,  Juice of  lemon,  Salt and pepper, fresh parsley to serve,  2 whole wheat dinner rolls

name: Salmon Teriyaki with Steamed Broccoli & Rice
ingredients: 2 salmon fillets (5 oz / 140 g each), skin-on,  3 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce or tamari,  1 tbsp honey,  1 tsp rice vinegar,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  1 tsp cornstarch dissolved in 1 tsp water,  1 cups cooked brown rice,  2 cups broccoli florets, steamed,  1 tsp sesame seeds (omit for SesF),  Lemon wedge to serve

ingredients: 2 tbsp doenjang (Korean fermented soybean paste),  3 cups low-sodium vegetable or anchovy broth,  1 block (7 oz / 200 g) firm tofu, cubed,  1 small zucchini, diced,   cup mushrooms (shiitake or oyster), sliced,   small onion, diced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 scallion, sliced,  1 small green chilli (optional),  1 cup cooked brown rice per person to serve

name: Rajma (Kidney Bean Curry) with Rice
ingredients: 1 can (15 oz / 425 g) red kidney beans, rinsed,  1 can (14 oz / 400 g) diced tomatoes,  1 small onion, finely diced,  3 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp ginger, grated,  1 tsp cumin seeds,  1 tsp coriander powder,   tsp turmeric,   tsp garam masala,   tsp cayenne (optional),  1 tbsp avocado or coconut oil,  Salt to taste, fresh coriander and lime to serve,  1 cups cooked basmati rice

name: Aloo Gobi Wrap with Mint Yogurt
ingredients: 2 medium potatoes, diced small,  2 cups cauliflower florets, chopped,  1 small onion, sliced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,   tsp turmeric,  1 tsp cumin,   tsp garam masala,  1 tbsp avocado oil,  Salt to taste,  4 small whole wheat rotis or wraps,   cup plain low-fat yogurt + 2 tbsp chopped fresh mint + pinch of cumin (dip)

name: Fish Tacos with Mango Slaw & Lime Crema
ingredients: 10 oz (280 g) tilapia or mahi-mahi fillets,  1 tsp cumin,  tsp smoked paprika,  tsp garlic powder,  Salt and pepper, 1 tbsp avocado oil,  6 small corn tortillas,  1 cup shredded purple cabbage,   ripe mango, diced,  Juice of 1 lime,   cup plain Greek yogurt + 1 tsp lime juice + pinch of salt,  Fresh cilantro

name: Pozole Verde with Chicken (Green Hominy Stew)
ingredients: 2 boneless chicken breasts (about 10 oz / 280 g), poached and shredded,  1 can (15 oz / 425 g) hominy, rinsed,  4 cups low-sodium chicken broth,  4 tomatillos, husked and quartered,  1 small onion, quartered,  2 cloves garlic,  1 jalapeo, deseeded,   cup cilantro,  1 tsp cumin,  Salt to taste,  Shredded cabbage, sliced radishes, lime wedges to serve

name: Spinach & Feta Stuffed Whole Wheat Pita
ingredients: 1 large whole wheat pita pocket,  1 cup baby spinach,  3 tbsp crumbled feta cheese,   cup canned chickpeas, rinsed,  4 cherry tomatoes, halved,  2 tbsp hummus,  1 tsp olive oil, 1 tsp lemon juice,  Salt and pepper to taste

name: Caprese Whole Wheat Sandwich with Pesto
ingredients: 2 slices whole wheat sourdough or multigrain bread,  3 oz (85 g) fresh mozzarella, sliced,  1 medium tomato, sliced,  6 fresh basil leaves,  1 tbsp basil pesto (store-bought or homemade  check for tree nuts),  1 tsp balsamic glaze,  Salt and black pepper to taste

name: Sheet Pan Chicken Thighs with Sweet Potato & Broccoli
ingredients: 4 bone-in chicken thighs (skin removed, about 1.5 lb / 680 g),  2 medium sweet potatoes, cubed,  2 cups broccoli florets,  2 tbsp olive oil,  1 tsp garlic powder,  1 tsp smoked paprika,   tsp onion powder,  Salt and black pepper to taste,  Fresh parsley and lemon wedges to serve

name: Beef & Vegetable Stir-Fry with Brown Rice
ingredients: 1 lb flank steak, thinly sliced against the grain,  2 cups brown rice, cooked,  2 cups broccoli florets,  1 red bell pepper, sliced,  1 cup snap peas,  1 medium carrot, julienned,  3 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  3 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce (or coconut aminos for SoyF),  1 tbsp rice vinegar,  1 tsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  1 tbsp cornstarch,  1 tbsp avocado oil,  2 green onions, sliced

name: Baked Salmon with Quinoa & Roasted Asparagus
ingredients: 4 salmon fillets (5 oz each),  1 cups quinoa, rinsed,  3 cups water,  1 lb asparagus, tough ends trimmed,  2 tbsp olive oil,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 lemon (zest + juice),  1 tsp dried dill,   tsp smoked paprika,  Salt and pepper to taste,  2 tbsp fresh parsley, chopped

name: Chicken Katsu with Brown Rice & Miso Soup
ingredients: 4 boneless chicken breasts (5 oz each), pounded to -inch thick,  1 cup panko breadcrumbs (GF panko for GF),  2 eggs, beaten (or aquafaba for EF),   cup all-purpose flour (or rice flour for GF/WF),  1 tsp garlic powder,   tsp salt,  2 tbsp avocado oil,  2 cups brown rice, cooked,  3 cups water,  2 tsp white miso paste,  1 cup silken tofu, cubed,  2 green onions, sliced,  1 sheet dried nori, cut into strips

name: Bulgogi Beef Bowl with Rice & Kimchi
ingredients: 1 lb beef ribeye or sirloin, very thinly sliced,  2 cups short-grain white rice or brown rice, cooked,  1 cup store-bought kimchi (or cucumber slices for SoyF/low-sodium),  2 cups baby spinach or shredded lettuce,  1 medium carrot, julienned,  1 cucumber, sliced,  2 tbsp toasted sesame seeds (omit for SesF),  3 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce (or coconut aminos),  1 tbsp brown sugar or honey,  1 tbsp sesame oil (omit for SesF),  3 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  2 green onions, chopped,   Asian pear or apple, grated (natural tenderizer)

name: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) with Basmati Rice
ingredients: 1.5 lbs boneless chicken thighs, cut into chunks,  1 cups basmati rice, rinsed and cooked,  1 can (14 oz) crushed tomatoes,   cup full-fat coconut milk (for DF version),  1 medium onion, diced,  4 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tbsp fresh ginger, grated,  2 tbsp ghee or avocado oil,  1 tsp garam masala,  1 tsp cumin,  1 tsp turmeric,  1 tsp coriander,   tsp chili powder,  Salt to taste,  Fresh cilantro for garnish,   cup plain yogurt (or coconut yogurt for DF),  1 tbsp lemon juice

name: Dal Makhani with Brown Rice
ingredients: 1 cup whole black lentils (urad dal), soaked overnight and drained,   cup kidney beans, canned (rinsed and drained),  2 cups brown rice, cooked,  1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes,   cup coconut milk,  1 medium onion, finely diced,  4 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tbsp fresh ginger, grated,  2 tbsp ghee or avocado oil,  1 tsp cumin seeds,  1 tsp garam masala,  1 tsp coriander powder,   tsp smoked paprika,  Salt to taste,  Fresh cilantro and lemon wedges to serve

name: Carne Asada Tacos with Black Beans & Pico de Gallo
ingredients: 1.5 lbs skirt steak,  8 small corn tortillas (certified GF for GF),  1 can (15 oz) black beans, rinsed and drained,  2 limes (juice),  1 orange (juice),  3 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp cumin,  1 tsp chili powder,  1 tbsp olive oil,  3 roma tomatoes, diced,   white onion, finely diced,  1 jalapeo, seeded and minced,   cup fresh cilantro, chopped,  Juice of 1 lime,  Salt to taste,  1 avocado, sliced,  Crumbled cotija cheese (optional  omit for DF)

name: Ground Turkey Enchiladas with Red Sauce
ingredients: 1 lb lean ground turkey,  8 corn tortillas (certified GF for GF),  1 can (15 oz) black beans, rinsed,  1 cup frozen corn kernels,  1 cups red enchilada sauce (store-bought low-sodium),  1 cup shredded Mexican-blend cheese (omit for DF),  1 small onion, diced,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp cumin,  1 tsp chili powder,   tsp oregano,  1 tbsp olive oil,  Fresh cilantro and lime wedges to serve,  1 avocado, sliced, to serve

name: Tofu & Vegetable Curry with Brown Rice
ingredients: 14 oz extra-firm tofu, pressed and cubed,  2 cups brown rice, cooked,  1 can (14 oz) full-fat coconut milk,  1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes,  2 cups baby spinach,  1 cup frozen peas,  1 medium onion, diced,  3 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tbsp fresh ginger, grated,  2 tbsp avocado oil,  1 tsp curry powder,  1 tsp turmeric,  1 tsp cumin,   tsp garam masala,  Salt to taste,  Fresh cilantro and lemon wedges

name: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl with Brown Rice & Edamame
ingredients: 1.5 lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs,  2 cups brown rice, cooked,  1 cup shelled edamame, thawed,  1 cup shredded purple cabbage,  1 large carrot, julienned,  2 green onions, sliced,  1 tbsp sesame seeds (omit for SesF),  1 tbsp avocado oil,  Teriyaki sauce: 4 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce (or coconut aminos for SoyF),  2 tbsp honey or maple syrup,  1 tbsp rice vinegar,  1 tsp fresh ginger, grated,  2 cloves garlic, minced,  1 tsp cornstarch dissolved in 1 tsp water

name: Bibimbap with Seasoned Ground Beef & Mixed Vegetables
